zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Hervey de Sutton於1168年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾塞頓 奧 特倫特時，他的父親Harvey de Sutton19歲，母親Elizabeth Patrick16歲。他於1190年與Elizabeth D'Evereux在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1199年在英國諾廷加姆爾塞頓 奧 特倫特享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

nameMeanings.name: Hervey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a Breton personal name composed of haer ‘battle’ + vy ‘worthy’. It was introduced to Britain by Bretons who settled in East Anglia and elsewhere in the wake of the Norman Conquest.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Hervey de Sutton was born in 1168, in Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Harvey de Sutton, was 19 and his mother, Elizabeth Patrick, was 16. He married Elizabeth D'Evereux in 1190, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died about 1199, in Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 32.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Hervey de Sutton(이)가 1168년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 수턴  트렌트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Harvey de Sutton(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Patrick(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1190년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Elizabeth D'Evereux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1199년 영국 노틴그함실르 수턴  트렌트에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.
